capabilities.title: 4. 脑裂修复与降级开关
capabilities.summary: Closed scope baseline by enforcing fail-closed monorepo behavior without explicit scope and fixing --project-root . semantics to resolve deterministically in plugin context; added/updated regression tests and verified acceptance checks.

capabilities.title: Contract Import and Markdown FSM Parser
capabilities.summary: Automatic contract import from JSON/Markdown files with strict FSM parsing to avoid pathological backtracking. Includes 64KB/1024 line limits, heading depth 1-3, parse budget 20k steps/200ms.

capabilities.title: Feature 6: readiness 校验器与 /prog-start 串联
capabilities.summary: Implement readiness validator that blocks feature start when contract fields (requirement_ids, change_spec.why, acceptance_scenarios) are empty, with warnings for test_steps/name issues. Added validate-readiness and fix-readiness commands.
